hero.title: Math olympiads, reimagined
hero.subtitle: Compete, learn, and have fun with real problems from international competitions. For students aged 8 to 14.

step1.title: Sign up free
step1.description: In less than 2 minutes. No credit card, no strings attached.

step2.title: Solve problems
step2.description: Practice with hundreds of problems or join an official competition.

step3.title: Earn medals
step3.description: Download your certificate, climb the leaderboard, and show the world.

schools.title: Schools already trusting Numoria
schools.subtitle: Join the first institutions transforming math education in Latin America.

auth.loginSubtitle: Sign in to continue your math adventure.
auth.registerSubtitle: No credit card required. The first 3 competitions are on us.
auth.name: Name
auth.magicLinkSent: We sent a link to {email}. Check your inbox and click to log in.
auth.magicLinkExpired: This link has expired. Request a new one.
auth.checkEmailDescription: We sent you a magic link. Click the button in the email to log in — you can close this window.
auth.checkSpam: Don't see it? Check your spam folder.
auth.termsAcceptance: By continuing you agree to the <terms>Terms</terms> and <privacy>Privacy Policy</privacy>.

errors.callbackFailed: We couldn't complete your sign-in. Please try again.
errors.providerError: The auth service had a hiccup. Try again in a few seconds.
errors.rateLimit: Too many attempts. Wait a moment before trying again.

errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
errors.notFound: We couldn't find what you're looking for.
errors.unauthorized: You don't have permission for this.

student.title: Tell us about yourself
student.subtitle: We just need a few details to personalize your math experience.
student.countryHelp: We auto-detect your country, but you can change it.
student.birthDateHelp: Just month and year (no full date, for your privacy).
student.inviteCodeHelp: If your teacher gave you an 8-letter code, enter it. You can also do this later.

errors.submitFailed: Couldn't save your info. Try again.

parent.title: Set up your family account
parent.subtitle: Add your children so they can compete. You can add up to 4.
parent.childEmailHelp: If they don't have an email, use one of your aliases (e.g.: dad+sofia@gmail.com).
parent.atLeastOneChild: You must add at least one child

parentDone.title: All set!
parentDone.subtitle: We sent {count, plural, =1 {1 invitation} other {# invitations}} to your children. Once they open their email and click the link, they can start competing.
parentDone.checkInbox: Check your own inbox too — you'll get a copy of each invitation.

teacher.title: Register your school
teacher.subtitle: This info appears in certificates, institutional ranking, and your school's public page.
teacher.schoolNamePlaceholder: E.g.: International School of San Pedro
teacher.schoolSlugHelp: Your public page will be numoria.app/schools/{slug}. Auto-generated, but you can edit it.
teacher.primaryColorHelp: Used for accents in your team's dashboard. Default: Numoria blue.
teacher.logoHelp: PNG, JPEG, WebP, or SVG. Maximum 512KB. Will appear on your students' certificates.
teacher.unverifiedNote: Your school remains "unverified" until Numoria's admin approves it (1-2 days).

teacherErrors.nameTooShort: Name must be at least 2 characters
teacherErrors.slugInvalid: URL can only contain lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens
teacherErrors.slugTaken: That URL is already taken. Try another one.
teacherErrors.logoTypeInvalid: File type not allowed (PNG, JPEG, WebP, or SVG)
teacherErrors.createFailed: Couldn't create the school. Try again.

metadata.title: Numoria Challenge — Online math olympiads
metadata.description: Math olympiad platform for students aged 8 to 14. Compete, practice, and earn medals. 3 free competitions, no card needed.
